# Transcrição: 07-Step 4 Tutorial - Mastermind Business Hub Uploading Your Lead Magnet

- **Fonte:** 07-Step 4 Tutorial - Mastermind Business Hub Uploading Your Lead Magnet
- **Duração:** 02:08
- **Idioma:** en

---

## [00:00 - 02:08]

Hey, Allie here from the Mastermind team. Now that we have our lead magnet created, which in our case is a resource guide, let's walk through how to upload it into the Mastermind Business Hub. That way, it's ready for you to connect to your funnel and fulfill to your prospects or clients after they opt in. First, you'll go to the Settings menu. From the Settings menu, we can locate media which will bring us to our media library. Inside of the media library, we can either choose to upload a file directly here or to create a folder. Let's do that for a little bit more organization. Next, inside of that folder, we can begin to upload our file. Let's select that Tech Leaders Toolkit that we just created, and we'll get that to upload. What's really cool is that from here, we can actually get a link to this direct file which will come in handy later. We can try it in a different tab and you'll see it takes us straight to this PDF for a really easy user experience. While I'm showing you how to upload your lead magnet file, I also want to address that this is where you will upload any and all of your imagery on the Hub, including any images you want to be displayed on your funnels or pages. Let's go ahead and upload another asset I have prepared. This image will later go on our funnel, but don't worry about completing this step now. Lane from our team will walk you through how to create a graphic for your website in one of our upcoming steps. I'll show you soon how you can take this image from your media library and add it to your page for a more visually appealing client experience. Again, your media section is located underneath your settings, and it's where any of your photos and videos can be stored for your business. Thanks for watching.
